name: OpenDexter
description: x402 marketplace access for OpenClaw agents. Search paid APIs, preview pricing, and auto-pay with USDC across Solana, Base, Polygon, Arbitrum, Optimism, and Avalanche.

svmPrivateKey.description: Solana wallet private key (base58) for USDC payments on Solana

evmPrivateKey.description: EVM wallet private key (hex, with or without 0x) for USDC payments on Base, Polygon, Arbitrum, Optimism, Avalanche

defaultNetwork.description: Preferred payment network when an endpoint accepts multiple

maxPaymentUSDC.description: Maximum USDC to spend per API call (e.g. '0.50' = $0.50)

facilitatorUrl.description: x402 facilitator URL for payment settlement

svmPrivateKey.label: Solana Private Key
svmPrivateKey.help: Base58-encoded Solana private key. Your agent uses this wallet to pay for x402 API calls on Solana.

evmPrivateKey.label: EVM Private Key
evmPrivateKey.help: Hex private key (0x...). Same key works on Base, Polygon, Arbitrum, Optimism, and Avalanche.

maxPaymentUSDC.label: Max Payment Per Call (USDC)
maxPaymentUSDC.help: Safety limit. Rejects any single API call costing more than this amount.

facilitatorUrl.label: Facilitator URL
facilitatorUrl.help: Override the x402 payment processor. Default: https://x402.dexter.cash

marketplaceUrl.label: Marketplace API URL
marketplaceUrl.help: Override the OpenDexter marketplace search endpoint.
